test_cases.name: health_check_ok
test_cases.description: Verify the health endpoint returns a successful status.

test_cases.name: create_author_success
test_cases.description: Create a new author with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an author without the required name field.

test_cases.name: get_author_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing author by ID.

test_cases.name: get_author_not_found
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a non-existent author.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books_conflict
test_cases.description: Attempt to delete an author who has associated books.

test_cases.name: create_category_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a category with a name that already exists.

test_cases.name: create_book_success
test_cases.description: Create a new book with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with an ISBN that already exists.

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_author_id
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with a non-existent author ID.

test_cases.name: get_book_soft_deleted
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a book that has been soft-deleted.

test_cases.name: delete_book_soft_delete
test_cases.description: Perform a soft delete on an existing book.

test_cases.name: restore_book_success
test_cases.description: Restore a previously soft-deleted book.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_new_book_error
test_cases.description: Attempt to apply a discount to a book published less than a year ago.

test_cases.name: update_stock_insufficient
test_cases.description: Attempt to reduce stock below zero.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_file_too_large
test_cases.description: Attempt to upload a cover image larger than 2 MB.

test_cases.name: create_review_success
test_cases.description: Create a new review for a book.

test_cases.name: create_tag_success
test_cases.description: Create a new tag.

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book_success
test_cases.description: Add multiple tags to a book.

test_cases.name: create_order_insufficient_stock
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an order for a book with insufficient stock.

test_cases.name: create_order_duplicate_book_id
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an order with duplicate book IDs in the items list.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_invalid_transition
test_cases.description: Attempt an invalid state transition (e.g., pending -> delivered).

test_cases.name: get_invoice_pending_order_forbidden
test_cases.description: Attempt to get an invoice for an order in pending status.

test_cases.name: add_item_to_non_pending_order_forbidden
test_cases.description: Attempt to add an item to an order that is not in pending status.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_partial_success
test_cases.description: Bulk create books where some succeed and some fail (partial success).

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_missing_api_key
test_cases.description: Attempt bulk book creation without providing the required API key.

test_cases.name: clone_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Attempt to clone a book with a new ISBN that already exists.

test_cases.name: create_book_export_missing_api_key
test_cases.description: Attempt to start a book export without providing the required API key.

test_cases.name: get_export_job_not_found
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a non-existent export job.

test_cases.name: toggle_maintenance_missing_api_key
test_cases.description: Attempt to toggle maintenance mode without providing the required API key.
